title: RF elements HG4-CC-A45, Asymmetrical Horn antenna, 5GHz, 45 °
description: The RF elements HG4-CC-A45 is a 5GHz sector horn antenna featuring a 45 ° asymmetrical beamwidth (30 ° in the elevation plane), 17dBi gain and (2) N female connectors . The antenna operates in the 5150-6400MHz frequency range. Thanks to its minimal side lobes, it provides an excellent signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and its compact size makes it suitable for deployment in environments with a high density of transmitters
